name: HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_VL
query: SELECT HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.REPEATING_TM_PERIOD_ID REPEATING_TM_PERIOD_ID, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_TL.NAME NAME, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.PERIOD_CLASS PERIOD_CLASS, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.PERIOD_TYPE PERIOD_TYPE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.PERIOD_START_DATE PERIOD_START_DATE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.MULTIPLE MULTIPLE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.MONTH_TYPE MONTH_TYPE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.ONE_OR_MANY ONE_OR_MANY, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.PERIOD_LENGTH PERIOD_LENGTH, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.REFERENCE_DATE REFERENCE_DATE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.RULE_USAGE RULE_USAGE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.TIME_ENTRY_USAGE TIME_ENTRY_USAGE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.APPROVAL_USAGE APPROVAL_USAGE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.WEEK_TYPE WEEK_TYPE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.PERIOD_CD PERIOD_CD, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.ACCRUAL_USAGE ACCRUAL_USAGE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.BALANCE_USAGE BALANCE_USAGE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.OVERTIME_USAGE OVERTIME_USAGE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.ATTENDANCE_TRACKING_USAGE ATTENDANCE_TRACKING_USAGE, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.SGUID SGUID FROM HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B, HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_TL WHERE HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_B.REPEATING_TM_PERIOD_ID = HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_TL.REPEATING_TM_PERIOD_ID AND HWM_RP_TM_PERIODS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
